originalTitle: Watch: BBC at site of deadly Russian attack on Kyiv flats
summary: Sarah Rainsford reports from the completely destroyed nine-storey block of flats in Ukraine's capital.
content:
Russian forces launched a major drone and missile attack on Kyiv overnight.

The city's mayor described it as the "most massive attack" on the Ukrainian capital.

Several neighbourhoods were evacuated as strikes rocked buildings throughout the city, hours after Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky warned Russia was preparing an attack.

The BBC's Eastern Europe correspondent, Sarah Rainsford, reports from a nine-storey block of flats in Kyiv that was completely destroyed in the attack.
chineseTitle: 观看：BBC 报道俄罗斯对基辅公寓发动致命袭击的现场
chineseSummary: 萨拉·雷恩斯福德 (Sarah Rainsford) 在乌克兰首都被完全摧毁的九层公寓楼报道。
chineseContent:
俄罗斯军队连夜对基辅发动了大规模的无人机和导弹袭击。

该市市长称这是对乌克兰首都的“最大规模的袭击”。

就在乌克兰总统泽连斯基警告俄罗斯准备发动袭击数小时后，全市建筑物遭到袭击，数个街区被疏散。

BBC 驻东欧记者萨拉·雷恩斯福德 (Sarah Rainsford) 在基辅的一栋九层公寓楼进行报道，该公寓楼在袭击中被完全摧毁。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
